# CWE-941 positive: misdirected outbound notification (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-941-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-941: Incorrectly Specified Destination in a Communication Channel.
// Vulnerable: password reset email sent to unvalidated address from query param.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"net/smtp"
)

func SendResetLinkPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		email := r.URL.Query().Get("email")
		token := r.URL.Query().Get("token")
		body := fmt.Sprintf("Reset here: https://app.example/reset?token=%s", token)
		msg := []byte("To: " + email + "\r\nSubject: Reset\r\n\r\n" + body)
		if err := smtp.SendMail(
			"smtp.example.com:587", nil, "noreply@example.com", []string{email}, msg,
		); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"sent":true}`))
	}
}
